projects.name: Agent Follow Through
projects.description: A proactive task follow-up system for AI agents backed by SQLite and cron scheduling, with Telegram notifications for task status updates.

projects.name: PTCG-Sim Deckbuilder
projects.description: A React app for building and managing Pokémon TCG decks, integrated with PTCG-Sim for testing strategies directly in the browser.

projects.name: Social Saver
projects.description: A full-stack web app with a React frontend and Django backend that connects to Facebook's API, letting users view and download photos from their albums.

projects.name: Dataset Generator
projects.description: A Python script that applies image transformations to generate augmented datasets for machine learning. Originally built for a college ML project, later expanded for broader use.
